case_title: MAZIAR AGHVAMI VS. JAMES F CAMPELL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-16-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-06-26 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MAZIAR AGHVAMI'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO SET ASIDE SANCTION ORDER IS OFF CALENDAR. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-27-2026 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Jun-16-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Sanction Order
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Maziar Aghvami's unopposed Motion To Set Aside Sanction Order is OFF CALENDAR.

Plaintiff seeks to set aside a sanction order that issued from the bench officer presiding in Department 610. Any such motion must be addressed to Department 610 and prosecuted by drop-off ex parte application. (See San Francisco Local Rule 3.3.)

Prior to the time set for hearing, Plaintiff shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order containing the above text verbatim.

No proposed order received. Plaintiff failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Continued To Mar-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to March 17, 2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
